title: Ryder starts flirting with Haruhi! ;D
description:
I hate you guys... I really do...

I am so tired of all this complaining about these tennis matches there are only 3 rounds left and you just had to kill my fun in it, I don't care if you like Walrusguy or Krobo just leave me the fuck alone. This match ran short because I was too stressed out to finish it and I didn't get any sleep at all today, I'm very sorry Pan I know its not what you expected but I can't do anything right now I'm just so mad at these flamers.

I would like to say thank you to everyone who sat through all these videos and showed some support I really appreciate it.

This match isn't over but I'm not sure if it will get any better.
